name: prompt-improver
description: Standalone Prompt Improver skill for Barter: transforms vague or underpowered requests into reliable AI prompts across text, JSON, YAML, markdown, visual UI, image and video targets. Routes through Raw, Text, Improve, Refine, Short, Deep, Visual, MagicPath, Image and Video intents with DEPTH-driven drafting, RCAF-default framework selection, CLEAR/EVOKE/VISUAL scoring gates and export-first delivery.
trigger_examples: improve this prompt for a customer support bot
$refine this draft and give feedback on the wording
$deep this is a complex, multi-step system prompt
build a magicpath user journey flow for onboarding
$image a midjourney photo prompt of a sunset over mountains
$video a runway motion clip of a car driving through rain
$raw passthrough this exact text with no validation
